productDisplayName: Belmonte Men Steel Bright Assorted Cufflinks
description: Style Note Understated yet elegant, this pair of designer cuff links from belmonte offers a refined finish to a formal shirt. This small accessory with dice in the centre has a big impact on the look of a dress or suit; a perfect accompaniment for any shirt. Product Details Square cuff links made of steel, with grey enamel Cylindrical back to hold the cuff in place Size Width: 2.3 cm
